tagline: AI Credit Scoring to boost lending profits and reduce NPLs
industry: AI-powered credit risk technology / FinTech SaaS
target_audience: Banks, digital banks, SME lenders, agri-lenders, retail lenders, credit bureaus, and financial institutions of all sizes seeking to improve credit risk decisioning
icp: Mid-to-large banks and lending institutions in Asia, MENA, Africa, and Australia looking to replace legacy credit scoring systems with AI-powered scorecards to increase loan approvals, reduce non-performing loans, and cut operating costs

products.name: CreditX
products.description: A no-code AI credit risk modeling SaaS platform that enables lenders to build, validate, and deploy high-accuracy credit scorecards from data to deployment in as little as one day.
key_features: 360 Data Link: connects to internal, external, and alternate data sources with intelligent data treatment (missing value imputation, bias reduction)
Quantum Model Builder: develops Application, Behaviour, and Collection scorecards for consumer and SME loans
Parameter Control Panel: over 20 customizable parameters for fine-tuning models
AI Toggle: choose between rules-based/logistic regression models and advanced ensemble Machine Learning, or a blend of both
Single-click API-based deployment with real-time decisioning and performance monitoring
use_cases: Building and deploying application, behaviour, and collection credit scorecards
Real-time credit decisioning for retail and SME lending
Credit risk model development for financial inclusion in underserved markets
metrics: Build scorecards in 1 day (vs. 9–12 months for other solutions)
Used by lenders in 11 countries across Middle East, Africa, APAC, and Australia

value_propositions: Highest accuracy AI credit scoring in the market, enabling more approvals with less risk
Build and deploy custom credit scorecards in a single day with no-code tooling
Blends traditional and AI modeling — lenders choose rules-based, logistic regression, or ensemble ML
Affordable and scalable platform designed for big banks, startups, and all lenders in between
Fair, transparent, and explainable AI with regulatory validation and ISO & SOC2 certification
key_metrics: Less than 0.03 seconds per credit decision
Scorecards built in 1 day (competitors take 9–12 months)
Used by lenders in 11 countries across Asia and MENA
USD 3 million raised in Series A from Accel (April 2022)

case_study_results: Lenders across 11 countries in Asia and MENA saw 20% increase in approval rates using CreditX
15% reduction in loss rates for lenders using CreditX
Large productivity boost in risk model development for lenders using CreditX platform
Deem Finance: made application and underwriting process more efficient with faster turnaround time while driving down cost of risk
differentiators: Builds credit scorecards in 1 day versus 9–12 months for competing solutions
No-code platform usable by any team member, not just data scientists
AI Toggle lets lenders choose traditional logistic regression, advanced ML, or a blend — no forced AI adoption
Completed AI Verify — the world's first AI governance toolkit — with regulatory validation
ISO & SOC2 certified with flexible hosting (on-prem, public or private cloud)
Covers full credit lifecycle: Application, Behaviour, and Collection scorecards in one platform
Advanced explainability at both model and decision level
Recognized as Top 10 FinTech in Singapore by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS)
key_messages: AI credit scoring that boosts lending profits and reduces non-performing loans (NPLs)
Go from data to live credit models in as little as 1 day (or 10 days end-to-end)
Democratizing access to cutting-edge AI credit capabilities for all financial institutions — from big banks to startups
Fair, transparent, and explainable AI validated by regulators
Driving financial inclusion by enabling lenders to reach creditworthy but underserved borrowers
Simple, scalable, seamless — one unified platform for modeling, workflow, deployment, and monitoring
Affordable pricing for lenders of all sizes
awards_certifications: Completed AI Verify — world's first AI governance toolkit
Recognized as Top 10 FinTech in Singapore by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS)
